article_meta.title: — News —Trump Honors Veterans At Arlington With Tales Of Valor, Courage, And Patriotism"America stands tall because Amer

reasoning: Mostly neutral tone but it adopts loaded phrasing (“politically correct”) without attribution and states contested/unclear claims (renaming DoD; renaming Veterans Day) as facts. Overall avoids the article’s celebratory rhetoric, yet includes a few instances of source framing.

custom_reasoning.spin: Verbs are largely neutral; one loaded phrase (“politically correct”) mirrors source language.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Presents DoD renaming and Veterans Day rebranding as accomplished facts without evidence or clear attribution.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Treats the evaluative label “politically correct” as a factual descriptor.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No heightened or dramatic language beyond factual recounting.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motives or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Article is one-sided; summary mirrors that without overemphasis.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: No alternative perspectives in source to omit.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Minimal; “politically correct” stands out as subjective.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: No undue emphasis on negative elements.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No systematic preference for elites or grassroots.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Generally neutral but inherits some framing and asserts disputed claims.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures main perspective; adds “historical military records” inaccurately as a source type.
